# BP-122 negative variant: Chi middleware emits a terminal response.
lang: go
file: BP-122-variant-safe.go
variant: chi
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/go-chi/chi/v5"
)

func record(next http.Handler) http.Handler {
	return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		if r.URL.Path == "" {
			http.Error(w, "missing path", http.StatusBadRequest)
			return
		}
		next.ServeHTTP(w, r)
	})
}

func router() chi.Router { return chi.NewRouter() }
